title: StackablePotions (Port)
body:
This is a fabric port of the simple yet helpful [Stackable Potions mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stackablepotions-forge) for 1.21 versions, by Cursed1nferno, since the mod left off in 2022. 

It was also a learning experience for me with how gradle monorepos work.

This makes potions of all types stack to 16 and adds a 1 second cooldown to splash/lingering potions for balancing. 

## ❤️ Credits

Cursed1nferno

---
